g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about data ingestion for this project')
sendPrompt('What CDC datasets are useful here?')
sendPrompt('What does preprocessing look like for NLP on social media text?')
sendPrompt('How do we build an LLM-based classifier for substance abuse risk?')
sendPrompt('How do embeddings work for risk signal classification?')
sendPrompt('How do we build a rule-based classifier as a baseline?')
sendPrompt('How should we evaluate and compare all three classifiers?')
sendPrompt('How do we detect temporal spikes in substance abuse posts?')
sendPrompt('How do we cluster posts to find behavioral patterns?')
sendPrompt('What is RAG and how do we use it here?')
sendPrompt('How do we generate explainable outputs from our AI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What should our final demo output look like?')
sendPrompt('What charts and visualizations should we include?')
sendPrompt('What summaries should our system generate for decision-makers?')
